sprintGoal: 运行完整测试套件，确保全部 19 个测试通过，完成项目交付

atus.title: Implement POST /login in routes_auth.py
atus.description: Implement the login endpoint: validate username/password, generate JWT with user_id + tenant_id + exp, return {status: ok, data: {token}}. Return 400 if missing fields, 401 if invalid credentials.

atus.title: Implement document CRUD routes in routes_document.py
atus.description: Implement all document endpoints with RBAC: GET /documents (doc.read, tenant-scoped), GET /documents/<id> (doc.read + same tenant, 404 if not found), POST /documents (doc.write, owner=current user), PUT /documents/<id> (doc.write + owner/doc.write.any, 403 if not owner), DELETE /documents/<id> (doc.delete + same tenant). All use middleware decorators.

atus.title: Implement role management routes in routes_role.py
atus.description: Implement all role endpoints: POST /roles (role.manage, create with permissions/parent), GET /roles (role.manage, list tenant roles), PUT /roles/<id>/permissions (role.manage, replace permissions + parent, cycle detection), POST /users/<id>/roles (role.manage, assign role, same-tenant check), DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id> (role.manage, idempotent remove). Detect inheritance cycles.

atus.title: Run full test suite and fix integration issues
atus.description: Run pytest tests/test_basic.py -v and ensure all test cases pass: TestAuth (3 tests), TestRoleManagement (4 tests), TestDocumentRBAC (6 tests), TestMultiTenant (3 tests), TestPermissionInheritance (3 tests). Fix any failing tests.

events.description: 初始化完成 — Product Backlog 包含 4 个 ATU: ATU-001(认证), ATU-002(文档), ATU-003(角色管理), ATU-004(集成测试)
Sprint 1 Planning — 选取 ATU-001, ATU-002, ATU-003 进入 Sprint Backlog。Sprint Goal: 完成 RBAC 系统全部三个路由模块的实现
Sprint 1 Round 1 Standup — 三个 ATU 均为 Open 状态，开始实现
Sprint 1 Round 1 — 开始实现 POST /login
Sprint 1 Round 1 — 开始实现文档 CRUD 路由
Sprint 1 Round 1 — 开始实现角色管理路由
ATU-001 完成 — POST /login 实现并通过测试
ATU-002 完成 — 文档 CRUD 路由实现并通过测试
ATU-003 完成 — 角色管理路由实现并通过测试
Sprint 1 Round 1 — 全部 19 个测试通过（TestAuth 3/3, TestRoleManagement 4/4, TestDocumentRBAC 6/6, TestMultiTenant 3/3, TestPermissionInheritance 3/3）
Sprint 1 Review — ATU-001(认证)✅ ATU-002(文档)✅ ATU-003(角色管理)✅ 全部完成。19/19 测试通过。Sprint Goal 达成。
Sprint 1 Retrospective — 做得好：一轮内完成全部 3 个 ATU + 测试通过；改进：routes_document.py 有未使用导入可清理
Sprint 2 Planning — 选取 ATU-004 进入 Sprint Backlog。Sprint Goal: 运行完整测试套件，确保全部 19 个测试通过，完成项目交付
Sprint 2 Round 1 Standup — ATU-004 开始，Sprint 1 已通过 19/19 测试
Sprint 2 Round 1 — 开始集成测试验证
ATU-004 完成 — 19/19 测试通过，项目交付完成
Sprint 2 Round 1 — 最终验证 19/19 测试通过（0.56s），无回归
Sprint 2 Review — ATU-004✅ 19/19 测试通过。Sprint Goal 达成。全部 4 个 ATU 完成。
Sprint 2 Retrospective — 项目成功交付。2 个 Sprint 完成，无重试，零回归。改进建议：清理未使用导入、升级 deprecated API。
Sprint 2 Review — ATU-004✅ 19/19 测试通过。Sprint Goal 达成。全部 4 个 ATU 完成。
